questions.prompt: Какой вариант правильно использует 'whose' для обозначения принадлежности?

choices.text: The teacher, who's book is missing, is upset.
The teacher, whose book is missing, is upset.
The teacher, who book is missing, is upset.
The teacher, whose's book is missing, is upset.

questions.explanation: 'Whose' должно быть followed by noun (book), а не сокращением 'who's' или ошибкой в структуре.

questions.prompt: В каком предложении 'whose' правильно используется в non-defining clause с запятыми?

choices.text: The building, whose roof was damaged, was repaired.
The building whose roof was damaged was repaired.
The building, who's roof was damaged, was repaired.
The building, whose's roof was damaged, was repaired.

questions.explanation: Non-defining clauses требуют запятых, и 'whose' должно быть followed by noun (roof).

questions.prompt: Какой вариант избегает ошибки использования 'whose' с местоимением?

choices.text: The company, whose it has a new office, is expanding.
The company, whose office is new, is expanding.
The company, whose is a new office, is expanding.
The company, whose office new, is expanding.

questions.explanation: 'Whose' должно быть followed by noun (office), а не местоимением или неправильной структурой.

questions.prompt: Какой вариант правильно использует 'whose' для организации (компании)?

choices.text: The school, who's library is open, is popular.
The school, whose library is open, is popular.
The school, whose's library is open, is popular.
The school, who library is open, is popular.

questions.explanation: 'Whose' используется для организаций и followed by noun (library), а не 'who's'.

questions.prompt: Какой вариант правильно использует 'whose' в non-defining clause с запятой?

choices.text: The book, whose author is famous, was bestseller.
The book, whose's author is famous, was bestseller.
The book, who's author is famous, was bestseller.
The book, whose author is famous was bestseller.

questions.explanation: Non-defining clause требует запятых, и 'whose' followed by noun (author).

questions.prompt: Какой вариант избегает ошибки 'whose' с местоимением после него?

choices.text: The girl, whose she has a dog, is happy.
The girl, whose dog is happy, is happy.
The girl, whose is a dog, is happy.
The girl, whose dog happy, is happy.

questions.explanation: 'Whose' должно быть followed by noun (dog), а не местоимением 'she'.

questions.prompt: Какой вариант правильно использует 'whose' для обозначения принадлежности человека?

choices.text: The woman, who's son is a doctor, is proud.
The woman, whose son is a doctor, is proud.
The woman, who son is a doctor, is proud.
The woman, whose's son is a doctor, is proud.

questions.explanation: 'Whose' followed by noun (son), и non-defining clause требует запятых.

questions.prompt: Какой вариант правильно использует 'whose' за ним следующее существительное?

choices.text: The car, whose it is red, is fast.
The car, whose color is red, is fast.
The car, whose is red, is fast.
The car, whose color red, is fast.

questions.explanation: 'Whose' должно быть followed by noun (color), а не местоимением или неполной структурой.

questions.prompt: Какой вариант правильно использует 'whose' в non-defining clause с запятой?

choices.text: The hotel, whose staff is friendly, is recommended.
The hotel whose staff is friendly is recommended.
The hotel, who's staff is friendly, is recommended.
The hotel, whose's staff is friendly, is recommended.

questions.explanation: Non-defining clause требует запятых, и 'whose' followed by noun (staff).

questions.prompt: Какой вариант правильно использует 'whose' для обозначения принадлежности предмета?

choices.text: The phone, whose it is broken, needs repair.
The phone, whose screen is broken, needs repair.
The phone, whose is broken, needs repair.
The phone, whose screen broken, needs repair.

questions.explanation: 'Whose' должно быть followed by noun (screen), а не местоимением или неправильной структурой.
